parameters.name: contents

parameters.subject: =Monthly P&L Report - {{ $json.month_name }}
parameters.text:
={{ 'P&L SUMMARY - ' + $json.month_name + '

' +
'Revenue: LKR ' + $json.total_revenues.toLocaleString() + '
' +
'Expenses: LKR ' + $json.total_expenses.toLocaleString() + '
' +
'Net Profit: LKR ' + $json.net_profit.toLocaleString() + '
' +
'Margin: ' + $json.profit_margin_pct + '%

' +
'EXECUTIVE SUMMARY:
' + $json.executive_summary + '

' +
'KEY INSIGHT:
' + $json.key_insight + '

' +
'RECOMMENDATION:
' + $json.recommendation }}

parameters.name: detail
parameters.value: ='Monthly P&L report for ' + $json.month_name + ': Rev LKR ' + $json.total_revenues + ', Exp LKR ' + $json.total_expenses + ', Net LKR ' + $json.net_profit
